modules.name: LeanInfoTheory
modules.summary: Lightweight public root import for stable finite Shannon and core certificate APIs.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Basic
modules.summary: Project namespace and shared status vocabulary.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Probability.Finite
modules.summary: Finite PMF real-mass bridge lemmas and pointwise PMF.map facts.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.InformationMeasures
modules.summary: Convenience re-export for the finite information-measure API.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.Entropy
modules.summary: Finite Shannon entropy, entropy of finite-valued random variables, and first entropy invariance theorems.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.EntropyBounds
modules.summary: Jensen-based finite entropy upper bound and uniform-law equality theorem.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.InfoMeasures
modules.summary: Marginals, conditional entropy, mutual information, conditional mutual information, and orientation lemmas.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge
modules.summary: Entry point for expected self-information, finite conditional laws, KL bridges, nonnegativity, and chain rules.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge.Conditional
modules.summary: Finite conditional-law API and expected conditional entropy / conditional mutual-information formulas.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge.FiniteSums
modules.summary: Finite real-sum rewrites and mutual-information log-ratio formulas.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge.KL
modules.summary: Finite KL expansion, mutual information as KL, and averaged conditional-KL bridge theorems.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge.Product
modules.summary: Independent-product PMFs, product-measure semantics, support formulas, and absolute-continuity facts.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Shannon.SemanticBridge.Theorems
modules.summary: User-facing semantic nonnegativity and first mutual-information chain-rule theorems.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate
modules.summary: Nonnegative-combination certificate soundness and exact decomposition matching.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate.Checked
modules.summary: Raw/checked certificate split with a first validator.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate.Monotonicity
modules.summary: Checked certificate demo proving one-variable entropy monotonicity.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate.Subadditivity
modules.summary: Checked certificate demo proving entropy subadditivity.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate.Submodularity
modules.summary: First non-toy checked certificate demo, proving entropy submodularity.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Certificate.ThreeWaySubadditivity
modules.summary: Manual certificate pressure-test module for three-way entropy subadditivity.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.EntropyExpr
modules.summary: Formal rational entropy-expression algebra and empty-entropy convention interface.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.EntropyVal
modules.summary: Abstract Shannon entropy valuations for certificate soundness.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.Examples
modules.summary: Separately importable toy examples for the certificate layers.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.PrimitiveIneq
modules.summary: Primitive Shannon inequality expressions and soundness under abstract valuations.

modules.name: LeanInfoTheory.MathlibFragments
modules.summary: Separately importable checklist of heavier mathlib information-theory and coding anchors.
